entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for growth, development, and yield

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: A state in India where pearl millet landraces are from

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study and ICRISAT are located

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: OPTIMUM GROWING CONDITIONS
entities.description: Ideal environmental conditions for crop growth

entities.name: STRESSED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions that limit crop growth

entities.name: SIMULATION MODEL
entities.description: A mathematical model used to simulate crop growth and yield

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental conditions affecting traits

entities.name: BIOMASS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process of increasing total organic matter in the plant

entities.name: BIOMASS PARTITIONING
entities.description: The distribution of biomass among different plant organs

entities.name: LIGHT EXTINCTION COEFFICIENT
entities.description: A parameter describing how light is absorbed by the crop canopy

entities.name: RADIATION USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant converts absorbed radiation into biomass

entities.name: DRY MATTER ALLOCATION
entities.description: The pattern of distributing dry matter to specific plant parts like leaf blades

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER
entities.description: The total number of grains produced

entities.name: GRAIN GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate at which individual grains accumulate dry matter

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING DURATION
entities.description: The length of time during which grains accumulate dry matter

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location of ICRISAT in India

entities.name: CULTIVAR
entities.description: A plant variety that has been bred for specific traits

entities.name: AXIS
entities.description: The structural part of the plant, distinguishing between main shoot and tillers

entities.name: TILLERING HABIT
entities.description: The characteristic of producing side shoots or tillers

entities.name: ANTHESIS
entities.description: The period during which a flower is fully open and functional

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical size or weight of individual grains

entities.name: NODAL TILLERING
entities.description: The production of tillers from the nodes of the plant

entities.name: ASSIMILATE AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of photosynthates for growth and development

entities.name: SURVIVAL STRATEGY
entities.description: An evolutionary adaptation to increase the chance of survival under stress
